name: Honey and Whisky Cake (Scottish)
recipeIngredient: Grated rind of a small Orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F/190°C. Grease two 7-inch sandwich tins.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the orange rind and beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Sift in about half of the flour and stir in the whiskey.
5. Fold in the remaining flour and mix until just combined.
6. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared tins and smooth the tops with a spatula.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cakes to cool in the pans for 5 minutes before turning them out onto wire racks to cool completely.
To make the Butter Icing:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat together the butter and honey until smooth.
2. Gradually sift in the icing sugar and orange juice, beating well after each addition.
3. Spoon half of the icing over one cake layer.
4. Place the second cake layer on top and spread the remaining icing evenly over the top and sides of the cake.
5. Decorate with toasted almond flakes.
